leader.translate: лидер, руководитель, вождь, глава, ведущий, предводитель, вожак, командир, полководец

examples.eng: Sol was the leader of the pack.
She was honoured as a community leader.
He's got all the qualities to be a leader.
examples.ru: У него есть все качества, необходимые для того, чтобы стать лидером.

examples.eng: the Times leader column
The scouts grouped around their leader.
Party members united behind their leader.
examples.ru: Члены партии сплотились вокруг своего лидера.

examples.eng: You need to choose a team leader.
The tour leader suggested several restaurants in the area.
examples.ru: Гид предложил несколько ресторанов в этом районе.

examples.eng: He is a charismatic leader.
These products are firmly established as the market leaders.
examples.ru: Эти продукты прочно утвердились в качестве лидеров рынка.

examples.eng: the leader of an army
a leader of the antiwar movement
He is a leader of great insight.
He was a thoroughgoing party leader.
a votary of the religious leader
a bluff and rugged natural leader
Mandela's status as a world leader
examples.ru: статус Манделы в качестве мирового лидера

examples.eng: the leader of the Republican Party
She is known as a visionary leader.
The political party chose a leader.
a Soviet leader of proven shrewdness
They chose Donald to be their leader.
an attempt to unseat the party leader
He is three points behind the leader.
examples.ru: Он на три очка отстаёт от лидера.

examples.eng: The leader of the parade waved a flag.
She's a confident and forceful leader.
County Championship leaders of Hampshire
examples.ru: лидеры чемпионата графства Хэмпшир по крикету

examples.eng: He has the dynamism of a natural leader.
the emergence of Japan as a world leader
examples.ru: появление Японии в качестве одного из мировых лидеров

examples.eng: a leader with a stern and resolute manner
